title: Daves Mixtape Vol.2
description: This is a Modpack that I made for my wonderful girlfriend and I to play while having cozy nights at home. It's called Dave's Mixtape because it is absolute heat! B-)
body:
UPDATE 2/3/2026
Hey Everyone, it's been a while and I had no Idea the pack was getting this much attention! I'm actually working on a new update that will add more and make a few changes in mods that I found 'do a thing, but better' so stay tuned for that and thank you all for the support!!

This is a Modpack that I made for my wonderful girlfriend and I to play while having cozy nights at home. It's called Dave's Mixtape because it is absolute heat! B-)

This modlist is about 2 years old but I'm going to be updating it as time goes on so that it eventually supports later editions of Minecraft
\
\
\
\
\
